notes: Generated projects may declare checked-in team-shared presets here.
Leave sanctionedAdditionalProfiles empty until the project intentionally commits a shared preset under env/*.json.
Sanctioned checked-in profiles must not keep smoke/xunit/bdd as success-on-placeholder contours.
Checked-in smoke/xunit/bdd commands must use repo-owned entrypoints or unsupportedReason, not inline or trivial success commands.
